visual_description: In a hospital room, a woman lies in a hospital bed covered with a pink blanket, holding a brown purse, while two men stand beside her—one in a plaid shirt and the other in a beige jacket—both looking toward her. A third man in a plaid shirt stands near a second hospital bed in the background, while a woman in a hospital gown sits in the background bed. The room contains medical equipment, curtains, and wall-mounted devices, with the individuals mostly facing each other or looking toward the center of the room.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a high pitch and moderate speed, speaking in a neutral tone.
